assertionResults.title: Dashboard pending inbox item pre-fills chat
assertionResults.reason: Clicking pending item 'rust-intro.md' replaced existing draft text and set chat input to 'ingest rust-intro.md' while Dashboard tab stayed selected.

assertionResults.title: Dashboard active page navigates to Wiki Browser
assertionResults.reason: Clicking 'TypeScript entity · 1 links' switched to Wiki tab and loaded entities/typescript.md with TypeScript page content visible.

assertionResults.title: Chat wiki mention navigates to Wiki Browser
assertionResults.reason: Could not obtain an assistant response containing a wiki-path mention to click. Mission guidance states Pi Agent CLI is unavailable in this environment.

assertionResults.title: Chat pre-fill does not auto-send
assertionResults.reason: After Dashboard pending click, input became 'ingest articles/ai-safety.md' while chat remained in initial empty state prompt with no new message entries and no captured websocket/network activity.

evidence.network: No requests captured after clearing request log during pre-fill check

assertionResults.title: Tab switching does not break components
assertionResults.reason: Completed Dashboard → Wiki → Sources → Timeline → Dashboard round-trip; each tab rendered expected content without broken layout or error states.

assertionResults.title: Source Manager to Chat to Wiki flow
assertionResults.reason: Clicking pending source in Sources set input to 'ingest rust-intro.md'; after switching to Dashboard and back to Sources, input still contained 'ingest rust-intro.md'.

frictions.description: Chat input initially rendered as disabled 'Connecting…' before becoming interactive.
frictions.resolution: Waited for connection state to settle before executing pre-fill checks.

frictions.description: Text-based locator for source item intermittently failed on nested button text.
frictions.resolution: Used snapshot refs (e11 etc.) for deterministic clicks.

blockers.description: Pi Agent CLI unavailable in mission environment, preventing validation of assistant-generated wiki mention link behavior.
blockers.quickFixAttempted: Sent chat prompt manually and waited for response; only user message appeared, no assistant mention/link rendered.
